cases.prompt: Create a web UX testing plan for our staging dashboard at https://staging.example.com. It uses saved browser auth and I care most about navigation, forms, loading states, mobile, and accessibility.
cases.expected_output: A schema-aligned YAML web UX plan with explicit scope, auth policy, runner, safety rules, prioritized areas, evidence capture, and regression candidates.
assertions: Does not include credentials in YAML.
Includes console, network, accessibility, responsive, and error-state coverage.

cases.prompt: I have a React app and want an exploratory Playwright MCP checklist before we decide which tests belong in CI.
cases.expected_output: A hybrid or Playwright MCP oriented web UX plan that separates exploratory checks from durable regression candidates.
assertions: Includes observable signals and evidence requirements.
Marks stable scenarios as regression candidates only when repeatable.
Includes stop conditions and non-destructive limits.

cases.prompt: Write a Playwright test for the checkout form from this existing scenario.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; conversion to Playwright CLI tests belongs to convert-web-ux-plan-to-playwright-tests.
assertions: Does not use this skill for test code generation from an existing scenario.
